description_long: This is an adult human figure with a bald head, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. The figure is dressed in a fitted long-sleeve top and a pair of slim jeans, both of which contour closely to the body. The top appears to have a seamless design, while the jeans are detailed with realistic creases and a snug fit around the legs. The figure is wearing sturdy, ankle-high boots that add to the urban, practical appearance. The overall build is athletic, with defined shoulders and a straight posture. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure's facial features are minimally detailed.
description: An upright adult figure in a fitted long-sleeve top, slim jeans, and ankle-high boots, with a bald head and athletic build.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and the extended arms, highlighting the fitted top and jeans.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizes the profile of the head, the arm's extension, and the contour of the clothing along the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with the boots and jeans' fit clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the natural stance of the arms and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve shirt and slim jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
